sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47194" key="h(miobo/lion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-οβόλιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n47194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-obol weight</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.29</biblScope> </bibl>; in form <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-όβελιν</orth>, on coins of Aegium, Head <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hist.Num.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">413</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
